# Ste

**Summary**: A standard laboratory procedure to assess flow characteristics and determine MMP in a gas-oil system.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-hakami|Al-Hakami, 2023]] used STE to evaluate the behavior of reservoir fluids in porous media and determine MMP via recovery factor analysis.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The determination of MMP from STE is inferred when the oil recovery factor (RF) reaches 90% or greater at 1.2 pore volumes of injected gas. ([[2023-al-hakami|Al-Hakami, 2023, p. 60]])
